creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Hardcoding the TLS_METHOD in py-twisted should no longer be necessary. I've addresses this issue in the proposed update of twisted to 24.7.0, see bug #281824 ([1]). Once this update has been merged, this issue should be resolved.

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=281824
